title: Replicate API request limit exceeded
symptom: The HTTP Request Node returns an AxiosError with status code 429, indicating too many requests. Despite this, the API processes requests correctly when checked manually.
not_this_if: Requests are within the normal rate limit
root_cause: Replicate API enforces a stricter rate limit of 6 requests per minute when the account balance falls below $5. This limit is not clearly communicated through the API response, leading to confusion.
fix_steps: Top up your balance to above $5
agent_instruction: Ensure your Replicate account balance is above $5 to avoid rate limiting.
